entities.description: A knowledge base article with versioning and full-text search support

computed.formula: See domain_rules for reading_time_minutes computation logic

fields.name: search_vector

computed.formula: See domain_rules for search_vector computation logic

fields.note: Updated via PostgreSQL trigger on content/title change. GIN indexed.

entities.name: Article

entities.description: Hierarchical categorization for knowledge base articles

computed.formula: See domain_rules for article_count computation logic

entities.name: Category

entities.description: Tags for flexible labeling of knowledge base articles

computed.formula: See domain_rules for usage_count computation logic

entities.name: Tag

entities.description: Immutable snapshots of article content at each edit
entities.name: Revision

entities.description: User comments on knowledge base articles with threaded reply support
entities.name: Comment

entities.description: File attachments associated with knowledge base articles
entities.name: Attachment

entities.description: Log of user search queries for analytics and improving search experience
entities.name: SearchQuery

computed_fields.formula: PostgreSQL ts_rank based on search_vector vs query (query-time computation)

domain_rules.rule: Slug must be unique within org
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Show validation error if slug already exists

domain_rules.rule: Draft articles not visible to viewer role
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Hide draft articles from viewer role listing

domain_rules.rule: Published articles create a revision snapshot before each edit
domain_rules.api_guard: Before PATCH: if current status=published, create kb_revision with current content
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Show 'revision saved' notification on editor open for published article

domain_rules.rule: search_vector updated via PostgreSQL trigger on content/title change
domain_rules.db_constraint: TRIGGER on kb_articles BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE OF content, title

domain_rules.api_guard: Return 422 if category_id is null on publish attempt
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Disable publish button if category_id is not set; show tooltip

domain_rules.rule: Archived articles cannot be edited — must restore to draft first
domain_rules.api_guard: Return 403 if article.status=archived on PATCH request
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Disable edit button for archived articles; show restore-to-draft option

endpoints.description: List articles with filtering, pagination and sorting
Get single article by ID, increments view_count
Create a new article in draft status
Update article fields; auto-saves revision if currently published
Publish a draft article; validates category is set; updates search_vector
Archive a published or draft article
Duplicate an article as a new draft
Get revision history for an article
Restore article to a previous revision; saves current as new revision first
Delete a category (only if no articles assigned)
Add a comment to an article
Upload a file attachment to an article (multipart/form-data)
Full-text search articles using PostgreSQL tsvector; logs SearchQuery record
Get top search queries and zero-result queries

uiStore.description: Global UI state — sidebar, modals, toasts

editorStore.description: Rich text editor state with auto-save support

flows.name: Create and Publish Article
steps: User writes content in RichTextEditor (auto-save every 30s via debounced PATCH to editorStore + PATCH /articles/:id)
User adds tags, category, cover image
Article status=published, search_vector updated via DB trigger, revision snapshot created

flows.name: Revise Article
steps: API auto-creates new Revision with previous content

flows.name: Search KB
steps: PostgreSQL full-text search on search_vector with ts_rank ranking
ArticleCards displayed with matched text highlights

flows.name: Restore Revision
steps: Current content saved as a new Revision to preserve state
UI refreshes ArticleEditor with restored content

modules.name: ArticleView
modules.description: Full reading view for a single article

modules.name: ArticleEditor
modules.description: Rich text editor for article authoring

modules.name: DraftsList
modules.description: List of draft articles for current user

modules.name: RevisionHistory
modules.description: View and restore previous article revisions

modules.name: KBSettings
modules.description: Manage KB settings, categories, and tags

generation_rules.rich_text_editor: Use TipTap or Slate.js for RichTextEditor component
generation_rules.auto_save: Auto-save every 30 seconds via debounced PATCH using editorStore dirty state
generation_rules.full_text_search: Full-text search via PostgreSQL tsvector with GIN index; ts_rank for relevance scoring
generation_rules.slug_generation: Auto-generate slug from title on create; allow manual override in editor settings
generation_rules.revision_creation: Create revision snapshot server-side before applying PATCH if article is published
generation_rules.search_vector_update: PostgreSQL TRIGGER on kb_articles BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE OF title, content sets search_vector = to_tsvector('english', title || ' ' || content)

deleted_at.notes: Soft delete — all queries filter deleted_at IS NULL

org_id_injection.middleware: req.body.org_id is stripped; injected from req.user.org_id

conflict_response.message: Record was modified by another user. Refresh and retry.

concurrency.high_contention_tables: see entities with high write concurrency

audit_trail.triggers: application-level (before write hook) — never DB trigger to avoid log bloat

standard_constraints.name: chk_{table}_deleted_order
standard_constraints.expression: deleted_at IS NULL OR deleted_at >= created_at

db_constraints_policy.enum_validation: DB ENUM types preferred over VARCHAR + CHECK; enum values defined in global enums registry

soft_delete_policy.filter: deleted_at IS NULL applied globally via query builder middleware
soft_delete_policy.cascade: Parent delete soft-deletes children via application cascade, not DB cascade
soft_delete_policy.hard_delete: Prohibited in production; available only via admin CLI with audit log
soft_delete_policy.restore: Set deleted_at = NULL; triggers audit log entry

naming_conventions.date_fields: Always use _at suffix for TIMESTAMPTZ, _date suffix for DATE
naming_conventions.id_fields: Primary key is always id; foreign keys are {entity}_id
